svg.title: Augurian AI architecture with explicit data pipelines
svg.desc: Five-layer architecture showing scheduled API pulls, manual dumps with normalization steps, a per-client Drive warehouse with raw and processed folders, a Claude Agent SDK orchestrator that spawns specialist subagents, and human review surfaces in Slack and Notion or Asana.
svg.text: Layer 2 — Ingestion pipelines (the part that did not exist on the whiteboard)
Layer 3 — Warehouse (Google Drive, one folder per client)
Layer 5 — Human surfaces (drafter pattern, never publisher)

g.text: Slack — real-time chat, clarifying questions, quick lookups
Notion or Asana — drafted reports, tasks (pick one, not both)
Manager DM + weekly digest — oversight, cost, escalations
